title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 25 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 25 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 25 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3.32%. the main contract I2401 closed 872, some traders were active to sell,Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 929-930yuan/mt; the same as yesterday.
